title: Waypoint IK Result
description: Result of one Tier 2 sequential-DLS solve for a single waypoint (see algorithms.result_types.WaypointResult and algorithms.sequential_dls). Position error unit: meter. Orientation error unit: radian and degree (both reported). Joint angle unit: radian. Quaternion order: wxyz.

trial_id.description: Identifier of the trajectory trial this waypoint belongs to, matching trajectories/trajectory_trials.csv.

trajectory_id.description: Identifier of the trajectory this waypoint belongs to, matching trajectories/trajectory_manifest.csv.

method.description: Which sequential-DLS algorithm variant produced this result.

waypoint_id.description: Zero-based waypoint index within the trajectory.

time_s.description: Speed-scale-adjusted timestamp of this waypoint, in seconds from trial start.

q_initial_used.description: Joint configuration [q1..q7] in radians actually used as the solver's starting guess for this waypoint (see the warm-start recovery policy in algorithms.warm_start_dls).

target_position.description: Commanded end-effector position [x, y, z] in meters, world frame.

actual_position.description: Achieved end-effector position [x, y, z] in meters (forward kinematics of q_solution), world frame.

target_quaternion.description: Commanded end-effector orientation as a unit quaternion [w, x, y, z], world frame.

actual_quaternion.description: Achieved end-effector orientation as a unit quaternion [w, x, y, z] (forward kinematics of q_solution), world frame.

position_error_m.description: Euclidean distance between target_position and actual_position, meters.

orientation_error_rad.description: SO(3) geodesic orientation error between target and actual orientation, radians.

success.description: Whether the DLS solve met the configured position/orientation success thresholds within max_iterations.

iterations.description: Number of DLS iterations performed for this waypoint's solve.

solve_time_ms.description: Wall-clock solve time for this waypoint only (excludes I/O), milliseconds.

sigma_min.description: Smallest singular value of the end-effector Jacobian at q_solution.

condition_number.description: Condition number (sigma_max / sigma_min) of the end-effector Jacobian at q_solution.

manipulability.description: Yoshikawa manipulability measure of the end-effector Jacobian at q_solution.

minimum_joint_limit_margin.description: Worst-case normalized operational joint-limit margin at q_solution (see kinematics.joint_limit_utils).

recovered_after_previous_failure.description: True only if the previous waypoint in this trial failed and this waypoint's solve succeeded (see algorithms.warm_start_dls recovery policy).

failure_reason.description: Solver failure reason (from kinematics.dls_solver.DLSResult.failure_reason) if success is false, otherwise null.
